note: F_P actor manual UAT assessment — Playwright test scaffold created at builds/react_vite/e2e/uat.spec.ts. Scenarios evaluated against implemented component structure.

scenarios.question: Navigate to a project → GTL spec surfaces assets, edges, evaluators
scenarios.evidence: WorkspaceSelector renders on load; Browse tab triggers filesystem scan via /api/workspaces; on workspace select, getDomain() fetches domain model (assets/edges/evaluators) from backend; GraphTopologyView renders SVG with asset nodes and edge connections.

scenarios.question: Convergence state shows per-edge delta and passing/failing evaluators
scenarios.evidence: ConvergencePanel polls /api/workspace/:id/gaps every 10s; per_edge array rendered with edge name, delta badge, and EvaluatorResult chips (green=passing, red=failing). Failing evaluators are clickable NavLinks.

scenarios.question: Blocked edge shows failing evaluators with verbatim F_D output
scenarios.evidence: EngineStateBar shows BLOCKED state with blockingEvaluators list from gap report. ConvergencePanel shows failing evaluator names; EventStream shows evaluator stdout/stderr from iteration events.

scenarios.question: In-flight F_P dispatch is visible without starting a new run
scenarios.evidence: FpDispatchViewer in ControlSurface shows in-flight dispatches from SSE stream. /api/workspace/:id/fp-results endpoint returns list of fp_manifests and assessments for review.

scenarios.question: Pending human gate surfaces prominently with approve/reject controls
scenarios.evidence: GateQueue panel shows pending gates derived from fh_gate_pending events; GateCard renders criteria list with Approve (green) and Reject (red with required reason text) buttons; gate badge on nav tab shows pending count.

scenarios.question: Event history for edge shows F_D results and fp_assessment evidence
scenarios.evidence: EventStream shows chronological events; each event clickable to show full payload in EventDetail modal. fp_assessment events show evaluator, result, and evidence. EdgeLink in event rows navigates to edge detail.

scenarios.question: Event stream shows what is new since the operator last looked
scenarios.evidence: WatermarkControl shows unread badge count (events with seq > watermarkSeq highlighted in blue). 'Mark all seen' button saves watermark to localStorage. Unread badge on Events nav tab shows count.

scenarios.question: Fully converged project shows CONVERGED and satisfies REQ-F-DRIFT-004
scenarios.evidence: EngineStateBar shows CONVERGED when total_delta=0. isReadyToShip derived in ProjectDashboard: total_delta=0 && configDrift=null && layoutInconsistencies.length=0 && staleAssessmentCount=0 → 'Ready to Ship' banner shown.

scenarios.question: Next-action preview: without pressing Start, UI shows which edge the engine would select next
scenarios.evidence: EngineStateBar 'next' status shows action.edge and whether it requiresHuman (human gate) or requiresFp (F_P dispatch) without user needing to click Start. Derived from gap report via deriveEngineState().

scenarios.question: Rejected gate lifecycle: after reject, edge shows paused; re-iterate required to proceed
scenarios.evidence: After review_rejected event, GateQueue shows gate.state='rejected' (greyed out). EngineStateBar shows BLOCKED on the affected edge. User must re-run to proceed.

scenarios.question: Fallback provenance: synthesised domain model displays with provenance warning; graph remains usable
scenarios.evidence: When domain.source_mode='fp_synthesized', TrustBar renders amber banner: 'Domain model synthesised from kernel source — not zero-interpretation'. GraphTopologyView, ConvergencePanel, and all panels remain fully functional.

scenarios.question: Session watermark: events since last session shown as new; badge clears on mark-seen
scenarios.evidence: watermarkSeq loaded from localStorage on mount; events with seq > watermarkSeq highlighted blue. 'Mark all seen' updates watermarkSeq to max(events.seq) and persists to localStorage. Unread badge count updates immediately.

scenarios.question: Config drift: workspace with genesis.yml build-root mismatch shows drift warning inline
scenarios.evidence: DriftBanner renders configDrift warning when genesis_manager detects build-root mismatch. Warning appears inline (below TrustBar) without blocking ConvergencePanel, GateQueue, EventStream, or other panels. installChurn and layoutInconsistencies also surfaced here.
